title: mimulus primuloides var. pilosellus
intro: Mimulus primuloides var. pilosellus, also known as Pilose Monkey Flower, is a variety of the Monkey Flower plant species, characterized by its unique appearance and medicinal properties. This plant is valued for its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Mimulus primuloides var. pilosellus include relief from respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce anxiety. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
